nasb.text: Beware of being negligent in carrying out this matter; why should damage increase to the detriment of the kings?”

esv.text: And take care not to be slack in this matter. Why should damage grow to the hurt of the king?”

cnv.text: 你們要留心，不可疏忽這事，使王的虧損增加。”

ccb.text: 要认真办理这事，不可迟延，何必容事情恶化，使王受亏损呢？”
